content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Dynamic Diameter". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/gym/102694/problem/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains two integers N and M, the number of nodes and edges in the graph. Then M lines, each containing two integers u and v, representing an edge between nodes u and v.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output the diameter of the graph after each edge addition.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a graph data structure and calculate the diameter after each edge addition using BFS or DFS.
